name: R8左轮手枪 | 炽烈之炎
nameZh: R8左轮手枪 | 炽烈之炎
descriptionEn: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints over a chrome base coat.
descriptionZh: R8左轮手枪有着高度精准且极具杀伤力的子弹，但代价是扳机拉动时间较长。在需要近距离火力压制的情况下，用手扳动击锤快速射击或许是最佳选择。 这把武器以铬为外表，使用喷笔涂上了透明涂装。
